svg.text: one rung deeper per failed fix

text.font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace

text.tspan: when powers of the same base are multiplied,

text.font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace

svg.text: RUNG 2 · THE CONSTRAINT, THEN THE MOVE

text.tspan: “A factor that can be negative flips the inequality
one minus x positive and one minus x negative, and solve both.”

text.font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace

svg.text: RUNG 3 · THE SOLUTIONS, ONE STEP ONLY

text.tspan: “Look up just this step in the solutions,
check how it respects the rule
explain it to yourself, then write it here in your own words.”

text.font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace

svg.text: the violated constraint is named at every rung · the corrected value at none
